docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIDES, JENNIE DBA. JUVESSENTIALS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH JEANNIE SIDES (TITLE: SOLE PROPRIETER). PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SUBMITTED TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,210.00 FILED BY SIDES, JENNIE DBA. JUVESSENTIALS AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, STEPHANIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, STEPHANIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIDES, JENNIE DBA. JUVESSENTIALS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS, STEPHANIE $1,210.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,365.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
